title: Phase 7 sidecar — trust boundaries
description: Structured trust-boundary catalog the Phase-7 (Trust Boundary Analysis) LLM persists at PHASE_END. Consumed by scripts/build_threat_model_yaml.py to populate threat-model.yaml[trust_boundaries[]] without re-composing in Phase 11.

trust_boundaries.description: Network/process/identity transitions where data crosses a trust line.

id.description: Stable boundary ID, lowercase + digits (e.g. tb-1, tb-2).

from.description: Origin side — existing component ID or the literal 'external' (network ingress). Cross-ref validated by aggregator — non-existent components surface as advisory warnings.

to.description: Destination side — existing component ID or 'external'.

controls.description: Controls enforced at this boundary (e.g. ['JWT validation', 'rate limiting', 'TLS termination']).

description.description: Optional 1-2 sentence elaboration shown in §6 Trust Boundaries section.
